metadata.description: Manually curated drug cost ranges by drug slug and state. Used by build_formulary_state_drug_summaries.py as Priority-1 source. Values sourced from V79 locked spec, plan SBC documents, CMS drug pricing transparency data, and carrier formulary documentation.

fields.after_deductible: Copay or coinsurance range the consumer pays for this drug AFTER meeting their medical/pharmacy deductible. Source: plan SBC cost-sharing tables.
fields.before_deductible: Full negotiated drug price the consumer pays BEFORE meeting their deductible (for plans that subject this drug to the deductible). Source: insurer negotiated rates, CMS drug pricing transparency data.

metadata.priority_note: When after_deductible is null for an FFE state, the ETL falls back to bencs_preferred_brand_rx_ranges.json (state-level BenCS PUF data, Priority 2). before_deductible must always be provided here — BenCS does not contain it.

AK.notes: [AK] before_deductible: Estimated negotiated price range for semaglutide injection (Ozempic) in ACA individual market plans before deductible is met. Source: CMS drug pricing transparency data and insurer SBC documents (2026). Lower bound consistent with NC V79 locked spec. after_deductible: derived from CMS BenCS PUF state-level preferred-brand copay range at ETL time (bencs_preferred_brand_rx_ranges.json).

Source: CMS drug pricing transparency data and insurer SBC documents (2026). CA.notes: [CA] after_deductible: Preferred-brand tier copay range for Ozempic/semaglutide in ACA SBM plans. Source: carrier plan benefit summaries and state exchange formulary filings (2026). Source: CMS drug pricing transparency data and insurer SBC documents (2026). Lower bound consistent with NC V79 locked spec.
